WO-JULES-DIAGNOSTIC-RUN.title: Diagnostic Run & Bug Forensics
WO-JULES-DIAGNOSTIC-RUN.instruction_raw:
1. Run `pytest tests/` to check current test stability.
2. Execute `python scripts/operation_forensics.py --ticks 60 --no-stress --output logs/diagnostic_raw.csv`.
3. Identify and debug any crashes, OOM errors, or hangs during the run. DO NOT get stuck in infinite loops. If you fix something, run the test again.
4. Write a detailed diagnostic report in `communications/insights/DIAGNOSTIC_RUN_REPORT.md` analyzing the root causes of any failures and providing potential fixes if not immediately resovable.
